question: (Spillage) What is required for an individual to access classified data?
canonical_answer: Appropriate clearance; signed and approved non-disclosure agreement; and need-to-know.

appears_in.answer: Appropriate clearance; signed and approved non-disclosure agreement; and need-to-know.
